title: KineticYeet
description: Reduces damage from falling or flying into walls with elytras by disabling the damage armor bypass.
body:
# KineticYeet
 
## Description:
Tired of dying when flying with elytras due to messy collision stuff ?\
Well this mod is made for you!


## Features:
Disable the armor bypass for the following damage sources:
- Falling
- Flying into a wall with elytras

**Result in a drastic damage reduction when wearing maxed Netherite Armor.**\
**_YOU ARE NOT IMMUNE TO FACEPLANT_**

It can still kill you, it is just very unlikely as the collision damage is now reduced from the armor.


## Compatibility:
Should work with most mods. Message me for further requests.


## About:
No port demands at the moment (versions or loader).\
Please feel free to report bugs/issues and suggestions on [Github](https://github.com/CDXX710/kineticyeet-1.21_fabric).
